title: Difficulty Bridge Levels (Chapter 3.5)
summary: Add 3 bridge levels between Chapter 3 and Chapter 4 to smooth the difficulty cliff identified in expert review (5/10 replayability, difficulty cliff Ch3→Ch4). New levels: 2-Input Decoder, Bit Comparator, Data Selector. Add new Chapter 3.5 with narrative. Update CHAPTERS array, level numbering, and ensure progress save/load compatibility.

tasks.description: Add 3 new bridge levels after current Level 17 (Full Adder). Level 17.5a: '2-Input Decoder' (NOT+AND, 3 gates optimal, outputs Y0=NOT(A)·B, Y1=A·B). Level 17.5b: 'Bit Comparator' (XOR+NOT, 2 gates optimal, EQ=XNOR(A,B)). Level 17.5c: 'Data Selector' (MUX pattern, 4 gates optimal). Each with truth tables, hints (3 tiers), postSolveInsight.
acceptance_criteria: Three new level objects exist in LEVELS array with correct truth tables
Each level has 3 hints, hintHighlights, postSolveInsight, and correct optimalGates/goodGates
Truth tables are mathematically correct for their described function
Levels use sequential IDs that don't clash with existing levels

tasks.description: Renumber existing levels 18-37 to 21-40 (shift by +3) to make room for bridge levels 18, 19, 20. Update all CHAPTERS arrays to reference new level IDs.
acceptance_criteria: Bridge levels get IDs 18, 19, 20
Former Level 18 (2-to-4 Decoder) becomes Level 21
Former Level 32 (Dark Gate) becomes Level 35
Former Level 37 (Phase Shift: Growing Complexity) becomes Level 40
All CHAPTERS level arrays updated with correct new IDs
No duplicate level IDs exist

tasks.description: Add new Chapter 3.5 entry in CHAPTERS array between Chapter 3 and Chapter 4, containing levels [18, 19, 20]. Include narrative: 'Systems Check', storyIntro about running diagnostics before warp drive, storyComplete, gatesMastered, color, and realWorld fact.
acceptance_criteria: New chapter appears in CHAPTERS array between Chapter 3 and Chapter 4
Chapter has id, title, levels: [18, 19, 20], narrative, storyIntro, storyComplete
Chapter has color, realWorld object with title/fact/device/icon
Chapter has gatesMastered array

tasks.description: Ensure progress save/load handles the new level IDs without breaking existing saves. Verify that isLevelUnlocked() chain works correctly across the chapter boundary (Level 17 completion unlocks Level 18).
acceptance_criteria: Completing Level 17 unlocks Level 18 (first bridge level)
Completing Level 20 unlocks Level 21 (first Chapter 4 level)
Existing progress data (old level IDs) doesn't crash the game
Progress bar total reflects new level count

tasks.description: Update bridge level between Chapters 2→3 (currently level 12) postSolveInsight to reference the new chapter structure. Ensure the level-select rendering correctly shows the new chapter.
acceptance_criteria: Level select shows Chapter 3.5 between Chapter 3 and Chapter 4
All chapters render with correct colors and level counts

testing_focus: All truth tables are mathematically correct
Level numbering is sequential with no gaps or duplicates
Progress save/load works with new and old level IDs
Level select renders all chapters including new Chapter 3.5
Level unlocking works across chapter boundary (17→18→19→20→21)
Optimal gate counts are achievable for each bridge level
rollback_criteria: If any truth table is incorrect or level numbering breaks existing features, revert
